caption:
Meta built a free AI receptionist into Instagram DMs, WhatsApp, and Messenger.

It answers questions, books simple appointments, and qualifies basic leads on its own.

Here's what it skips: no CRM behind it, no lead routing, no follow-up once the chat ends. A prospect types "ready to book" and the thread sits untouched until someone opens the app.

This week, turn it on for the basics: hours, pricing range, service area.

Then set a keyword alert for "ready," "book," and "price." Route those replies straight to a human or your CRM within 5 minutes.

DM "AGENT" and the Black Arrow team will show you how to build that handoff.

#SpeedToLead #ServiceBusiness #LeadFollowUp #InstagramMarketing #SmallBusinessGrowth
rationale: Meta's global Business Agent launch is genuine, current news untouched by this account, and reels still lead reach for cold audiences, so this interprets the platform shift through the speed-to-lead gap it doesn't solve instead of just recapping the feature.
